name: socialfetch
description: Fetch social-media URLs and run web/social searches via Claude Code. Wraps HackerNews / Reddit / GitHub / X / LinkedIn / YouTube / Bluesky / arXiv / Medium / Substack / RSS / generic article fetchers, plus search and grounded-answer engines (Perplexity, Grok, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Tavily, SerpAPI).
